intentSummary: Make Mission Studio the SYNTH homepage.; Immerse visitors in a guided, interactive Mission Studio experience.; Project every SYNTH lifecycle phase inside a persistent workspace.; Release Mission Studio only after its lifecycle completes, then show supporting content.; Certify that a first-time visitor understands SYNTH in under five minutes without external documentation.
expectedExperience: A visitor lands on the SYNTH homepage and experiences Mission Studio as the product. They leave understanding intent modeling, discovery, missions, expeditions, governance, replay, and architecture because they interacted with them directly.
requiredProperties: Hero section that invites visitors into Mission Studio.
Light workspace theme as the default experience.
Typography and spacing adjustments within the LDS-002 token scale.
Demo operator adapter that simulates AI execution deterministically.
forbiddenProperties: Generic SaaS dashboard with metric cards and promotional banners.
Marketing-first landing page where Mission Studio is one section among many.
Chat interface with decorative AI imagery.
Page-jump navigation instead of a persistent workspace.
Hardcoded visual values outside the LDS-002 token system.
requiredBehaviors: Supporting content appears after Mission Studio releases
successCriteria: A visitor lands on the SYNTH homepage and experiences Mission Studio as the product. They leave understanding intent modeling, discovery, missions, expeditions, governance, replay, and architecture because they interacted with them directly.
forbiddenInterpretation: Generic SaaS dashboard with metric cards and promotional banners.
